programs.name: Y Combinator
programs.prerequisites: Early-stage startup, technical co-founder preferred, scalable idea.

programs.name: Techstars
programs.prerequisites: Strong team, product-market fit potential, scalable technology.

programs.name: 500 Global
programs.prerequisites: Post-revenue or strong traction, diverse teams, global focus.

programs.name: Antler
programs.prerequisites: Individual founders or teams, pre-idea or early stage.

programs.name: Entrepreneur First
programs.prerequisites: Talented individuals, pre-team, pre-idea, technical background.

programs.name: Plug and Play
programs.prerequisites: Industry-specific focus, later stage often preferred.

programs.name: Seedcamp
programs.prerequisites: European focus, pre-seed/seed stage, high growth potential.
